## Problem
What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Business Impact
How does this affect the testing workflow or compliance?

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, or related OEM requirements.
